positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mystical forest gateway, framing a central, glowing portal. The scene should feature whimsical, stylized flora, deep mossy greens, emerald accents, and golden light spilling from the portal. Include delicate bioluminescent elements and floating, stylized butterfly forms. The composition must be symmetrically centered, highly detailed, designed with thick clean outlines (vector art style), and suitable for screen printing or digital apparel transfer. The overall mood is enchanted and inviting. Artwork should utilize a high-contrast, flat graphic aesthetic, with clear negative space for optimal print placement.
negative: blurry, grainy, messy, photo, realistic, signature, text, watermark, lowres, noisy, artifact, ugly, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered fingers, grayscale
